High Accuracy Measuring -
Ceramic CMMs and Optical Scanners
Industrial measurement technology for all your metrology and quality assurance tasks: At
LK Metrology
we understand that
quality assurance
is the backbone of modern
manufacturing
. That’s why our
Coordinate Measuring Machines
(CMMs) are built with advanced
ceramic structures
– delivering unmatched thermal stability, rigidity and long-term precision.
Our commitment to excellence goes beyond design: we offer a
10-year guarantee
on original accuracy, giving you confidence that lasts.
Discover industry-specific metrology solutions –
such as
automotive, aerospace, defence, motorsport, energy, medical, electronic or automation
– and see how LK Metrology helps you achieve consistent, sustainable quality.
Learn more about our Ceramic CMMs and optical scanners, large volume coordinate measuring machines, Shopfloor solutions, bridge-type and column-type CMMs, Portable Measuring Arms and metrology software for accurate and precise measuring.
High precision & lasting accuracy
Learn more about the advantages of ceramics and our unique 10 year guarantee.
Full Range Portfolio
Whatever and in which size you want to measure - we have a solution for you.
Excellent service nearby
Easy to reach, fast reaction, satisfying solution and always nearby - our service shines.
Subsidiaries worldwide
With dealerships all over the world and direct subsidiaries in
11 mayor markets we´re always at your side.

News:
CMM fulfills F1 requirements: contract manufacturer ActionPlas secures future growth
20 March 2026
Few people outside the tile-making and building industry know that a good quality roof tile has to be manufactured to a tolerance as tight as plus or minus half a millimetre.
BMI uses FreedomArm, a H120 laser line scanner, a rotatable index table and Polyworks to check the tolerances of roof tiles, monitor the wear on moulds and reverse-engineer replacement components.
Read More »
Large Volume CMM: new MAXIMA table and twin-rail version available
5 December 2025
With measuring volumes from 12m³ to 72m³, the MAXIMA table range offers the largest measurement capacity of any bridge-type table CMM available today.
Read More »
BMI: Laser scanning transforms inspection of roofing products
23 July 2025
Few people outside the tile-making and building industry know that a good quality roof tile has to be manufactured to a tolerance as tight as plus or minus half a millimetre.
BMI uses FreedomArm, a H120 laser line scanner, a rotatable index table and Polyworks to check the tolerances of roof tiles, monitor the wear on moulds and reverse-engineer replacement components.

Our Metrology Portfolio
Measuring Machines, Sensors and Inspection Software
CMMs, Optical Sensors, Software, Portable Measuring Arms or Metrology Accessories: whatever you need to ensure and improve the quality of your manufacturing – LK Metrology offers a solution for your quality assurance and manufacturing inspection.
Our innovative CMM hardware and software solutions are renowned worldwide for improving the quality of manufactured components across various industries. Our precision technology supports the entire process chain from design to quality assurance in
automotive
aerospace
, defense, motorsport,
energy
medical
and
automation

10 year original accuracy guarantee
Contacts
Local LK Offices
Local LK Metrology offices all around the world offer industrial metrology services and world-class CMM solutions from small shopfloor to large gantry machines for Aerospace and Defense.
Beside our UK headquarter in Derby our locations include the USA, France, Italy, Germany, China, Japan, Poland, the Benelux region and Mexico. Beside that we have local partners and dealerships in more than 30 countries. This tight network of specialists ensures that our machines come with best in class service and support.
Contact your local LK Metrology offices for any upcoming questions on our
measuring machines
optical scanners
metrology accessories
software
and
services
. If your country is not listed below, get in touch and we direct you to our local partner.
